message:
Fix compatibility with pi 0.69

Update agent schemas, session handling, skill loading, and expand hints for the current Pi extension APIs so installed packages load under pi 0.69.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+---
+title: Compatibility with pi 0.69
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - codex
+created: 2026-04-23T06:58:20.623658Z
+---
+
+The extension now loads correctly with pi 0.69 and later.
+
+Agent tools, workflow schemas, session refresh handling, skill prompt loading, and expand hints now use the current pi extension APIs, so agent orchestration continues to work after pi’s TypeBox, session event, and TUI updates.

   },

-    "@mariozechner/pi-ai": "*",

+    "@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent": "^0.69.0",
+    "@mariozechner/pi-tui": "^0.69.0",
     "@types/node": "^24.3.0",

+    "typebox": "*"
+  },
   "pi": {
     "extensions": [
       "./src"

 export const WorkflowParamsSchema = Type.Object({
